mainEntity.name: Is shop act registration mandatory in Chennai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. All commercial establishments, shops, offices, and restaurants in Chennai must register within 30 days of commencing business under the Tamil Nadu Shops and Establishments Act, 1947. Non-registration attracts penalties under Section 30.

mainEntity.name: What documents are needed for shop act registration in Chennai?

acceptedAnswer.text: PAN card, Aadhaar of proprietor/partners/directors, address proof of premises (rent agreement + NOC or ownership proof), nature of business details, and list of employees with joining dates.

mainEntity.name: How long does shop act registration take in Chennai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typically 7-15 working days from application submission. The Inspector of Labour may conduct a site inspection. We follow up proactively to ensure timely issuance.
